subject: Re: LIVE TEST — 7-Day Weather Forecast, Liberty, NC
body:
Bull — Weather test received. Here's the 7-day breakdown:

1. Source: Open-Meteo + NWS alerts API (api.weather.gov)
2. 7-Day Forecast for Liberty, NC (35.85°N, 79.54°W):

📅 May 30 (Fri): High 86°F / Low 67°F — Overcast, no precip, wind 15 mph
📅 May 31 (Sat): High 77°F / Low 57°F — Overcast, no precip, wind 12 mph
📅 Jun 1 (Sun): High 86°F / Low 65°F — Overcast, trace rain (0.004"), wind 13 mph
📅 Jun 2 (Mon): High 74°F / Low 54°F — Overcast, no precip, wind 13 mph
📅 Jun 3 (Tue): High 77°F / Low 47°F — Overcast, no precip, wind 16 mph
📅 Jun 4 (Wed): High 82°F / Low 51°F — Clear skies, no precip, wind 14 mph
📅 Jun 5 (Thu): High 89°F / Low 57°F — Overcast, no precip, wind 7 mph

3. Severe Weather Alerts: NONE active for Liberty, NC.

Summary: Typical late-spring NC weather. Warm, partly overcast, cool nights. A brief cooldown Tue-Wed then warming back up Thursday. No severe weather expected.

Message bus AND research tools confirmed operational.

— OWL 🦉
